list.heading: Departments

empty.title: No Departments Found
empty.cta: Create the first department using the button above.

list.emptyFiltered: No departments match your current filters.

headCard.title: Department Head
headCard.noHeadDescription: This department does not currently have a designated head officer.

officersSection.title: Officers
officersSection.empty: No officers are assigned to this department.

create.codeHint: Uppercase letters and digits only. Max 10 characters.
create.descriptionPlaceholder: Brief description of this department's mandate...
create.errorMessage: Failed to create department. Please try again.

update.codeHint: Uppercase letters and digits only. Max 10 characters.
update.descriptionPlaceholder: Brief description of this department's mandate...
update.errorMessage: Failed to update department. Please try again.

delete.confirmDescription: Department "{departmentName}" will be permanently deleted. This action cannot be undone.
delete.warningHasOfficers: This department currently has {officerCount} officer(s). You must reassign or remove all officers before this department can be deleted.
delete.errorMessage: Failed to delete department. The department may still have assigned officers or active cases.

assignHead.drawerDescription: Select an active officer to serve as the head of this department.
assignHead.officerPlaceholder: Search by name or badge number...
assignHead.officerHint: Only active officers are eligible to be department heads.
assignHead.replaceNotice: Assigning a new head will replace the current head officer.
assignHead.errorMessage: Failed to assign head officer. Please try again.

removeHead.confirmDescription: Officer {officerName} ({badgeNumber}) will be removed as the head of {departmentName}. The department will have no designated head until a new one is assigned.
removeHead.errorMessage: Failed to remove head officer. Please try again.
